title: columnea pubescens
intro: Columnea pubescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the hairy columnea or hairy goldfish plant. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Columnea pubescens include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
